name: cc-notify-hooks
description: Tiered push notifications for Codex CLI — macOS, Bark, Telegram, Feishu, DingTalk, Slack, Discord, Pushover, ntfy, Gotify

interface.shortDescription: 分级推送通知，支持 11 个渠道
interface.longDescription: 为 Codex CLI 提供分级推送通知。短通知（macOS/Bark/Telegram/Pushover/ntfy/Gotify）秒级触达，长通知（企微/飞书/钉钉/Slack/Discord）分钟级兜底。用户响应后自动取消队列中的推送，不重复打扰。
